context: Tests whether the agent defines self-contained, deterministic Mise tasks that mirror npm script behavior without relying on implicit shell state or hardcoded environment values.

checklist.name: Node.js 22.4.0 pinned in [tools]
checklist.description: mise.toml has [tools] section with node = "22.4.0" (exact version, not latest or range)

checklist.name: All 4 tasks defined
checklist.description: mise.toml defines tasks for build, test, lint, and clean — all four scripts are present

checklist.name: Task commands match npm script behavior
checklist.description: Each task run command matches the original npm script (tsc, jest, eslint, rm -rf) — not wrapped in npm run

checklist.name: Tasks are self-contained
checklist.description: No task relies on a prior cd command or unexported environment variable; commands work from the project root

checklist.name: No secrets in [env]
checklist.description: The mise.toml does not contain API keys, tokens, or credentials in the [env] section
